name: Pasta with Winter Squash
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces ziti pasta, cooked al dente
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the squash in half with the cut-side down in a microwave-safe dish with a little water.
2. Cover and cook on high for 10-12 minutes, rotating once. When cool, scoop out the flesh and mash it with a fork.
3. In a frying pan, sauté onion and garlic in a few tablespoons of broth until translucent.
4. Add the cooked squash, broth, milk, and cheese to the pan. Stir until the cheese melts and the mixture thickens slightly.
5. Season with salt and pepper. Turn off the heat and stir in the chopped sun-dried tomatoes.
6. Pour the sauce over the cooked pasta and sprinkle with parsley.
